deployment_steps: Run unit and integration tests locally
Build Docker image with the updated code
Push Docker image to container registry
Deploy updated container to staging environment
Run automated health checks and manual smoke tests in staging
Verify environment variables including OPENAI_API_KEY are set correctly
Deploy container to production environment during low traffic window
Monitor logs and metrics for errors or performance issues
Confirm API endpoints respond correctly and rate limiting works as expected
health_checks: API endpoint /api/motivational-phrase returns 200 with valid response
Rate limiting enforces max 30 requests per minute
No errors in server logs related to OpenAI API calls
Server process is running and listening on expected port
result.rollback_plan: If critical errors or performance degradation are detected post-deployment, immediately revert to the previous stable Docker image version and redeploy. Notify the team and investigate the root cause before attempting redeployment.
